ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.description:
NEON observational data are provided via the NEON Data Portal <https://www.neonscience.org>
and NEON API, and can be downloaded and reformatted by the "neonUtilities" package.
NEON observational data (human-observed measurements, and analyses derived from
human-collected samples, such as tree diameters and algal chemistry) are published
in a format consisting of one or more tabular data files. This package provides
tools for performing common operations on NEON observational data, including checking
for duplicates and joining tables.
about.summary: Basic Data Wrangling for NEON Observational Data

about.description:
NEON observational data are provided via the NEON Data Portal <https://www.neonscience.org>
and NEON API, and can be downloaded and reformatted by the "neonUtilities" package.
NEON observational data (human-observed measurements, and analyses derived from
human-collected samples, such as tree diameters and algal chemistry) are published
in a format consisting of one or more tabular data files. This package provides
tools for performing common operations on NEON observational data, including checking
for duplicates and joining tables.
about.summary: Basic Data Wrangling for NEON Observational Data

name: r-neonos
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.1.0" %}
{% set posix = "m2-" if win else "" %}

package:
  name: r-neonos
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/neonOS_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/neonOS/neonOS_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 207224e77c84953a2284139a844f2d6f6eb04bc0f1498df634691f03cd2b1563

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - "*/R.dll"  # [win]
    - "*/Rblas.dll"  # [win]
    - "*/Rlapack.dll"  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip  # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}  # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-curl
    - r-data.table
    - r-httr
    - r-jsonlite
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-curl
    - r-data.table
    - r-httr
    - r-jsonlite

test:
  requires:
    - r-testthat
  source_files:
    - tests/
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('neonOS')"  # [not win]
    - $R -e "testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)"  # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('neonOS')\""  # [win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"testthat::test_file('tests/testthat.R', stop_on_failure=TRUE)\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/NEONScience/NEON-OS-data-processing
  license: AGPL-3.0-or-later
  summary: Basic Data Wrangling for NEON Observational Data
  description: |
    NEON observational data are provided via the NEON Data Portal <https://www.neonscience.org>
    and NEON API, and can be downloaded and reformatted by the "neonUtilities" package.
    NEON observational data (human-observed measurements, and analyses derived from
    human-collected samples, such as tree diameters and algal chemistry) are published
    in a format consisting of one or more tabular data files. This package provides
    tools for performing common operations on NEON observational data, including checking
    for duplicates and joining tables.
  license_family: AGPL
  license_file:
    - "{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/AGPL-3"
  dev_url: https://github.com/NEONScience/NEON-OS-data-processing
  doc_url: https://www.neonscience.org/resources/learning-hub/tutorials/download-explore-neon-data

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - cklunch
